mapper.select:
SELECT POHD.GATE_CD , PODT.PR_BUYER_CD AS PR_BUYER_CD , PODT.PR_DEPT_CD AS PR_DEPT_CD , PODT.PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHD.BUYER_CD , POHD.DEPT_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , POHD.PO_NUM , POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM ,GETFILECOUNT(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM) AS ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT , POHD.SUBJECT , PODT.ITEM_CNT , POHD.PO_AMT , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_DATE , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_REJECT_RMK , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE FROM STOCPOHD POHD LEFT JOIN (SELECT PODT.GATE_CD , POHD.BUYER_CD , POHD.PO_NUM , PODT.PR_BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , PODT.PR_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , COUNT(PODT.ITEM_CD) AS ITEM_CNT FROM STOCPOHD POHD LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS IS NOT NULL AND POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG = '0'
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_PO_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_PO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.SUBJECT) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
AND POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = #{DELIVERY_TYPE}
AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS = #{VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS}
GROUP BY PODT.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.PO_NUM, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD ) PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM) WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS IS NOT NULL AND POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG = '0'
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_PO_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_PO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.SUBJECT) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
AND POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = #{DELIVERY_TYPE}
AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS = #{VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS}
AND POHD.PROGRESS_CD != '5100' ORDER BY POHD.PO_NUM DESC

SELECT distinct POHD.PO_NUM --선정품의나 기타 화면에서 품목복사를 하여, 구매의뢰 품목 개수보다 많아질 수 있음, CNDT.PR_SQ = PODT.PR_SQ 만으로는 중복데이터발생 , PODT.PO_SQ , PODT.PR_NUM , PODT.PR_SQ , PODT.ITEM_CD , PODT.ITEM_DESC , PODT.ITEM_SPEC , PODT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', PODT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , PODT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.ORIGIN_CD , PODT.PO_QT , PODT.UNIT_CD , PODT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , POHD.CTRL_CD , PODT.PO_WT_NUM , PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE , PODT.PR_BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , PODT.PR_DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , (PODT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , (PODT.RMK) AS RMK , PODT.EXEC_NUM , CNDT.RFX_NUM , MTGL.MAJOR_ITEM_FLAG , PODT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPOHD POHD LEFT JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCMTGL MTGL ON (MTGL.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND MTGL.ITEM_CD = PODT.ITEM_CD AND MTGL.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.PB_BUYER_CD = PODT.PB_BUYER_CD AND CNDT.PR_NUM = PODT.PR_NUM AND CNDT.PR_SQ = PODT.PR_SQ AND CNDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POHD.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM}

SELECT POPY.PO_NUM , POPY.PAY_CNT , MAX(POPY.PAY_CNT_TYPE) AS PAY_CNT_TYPE , MAX(POPY.PAY_CNT_NM) AS PAY_CNT_NM , MAX(POPY.PAY_PERCENT) AS PAY_PERCENT , MAX(POPY.PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT , MAX(POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE) AS PAY_METHOD_TYPE , MAX(POPY.PAY_METHOD_NM) AS PAY_METHOD_NM , (MAX(POPY.PAY_DUE_DATE), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_DUE_DATE , LISTAGG(POPC.PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY POPC.PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM) AS PY_BUYER_NM , MAX(POPY.PAY_AMT) AS PY_PAY_AMT FROM STOCPOPY POPY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , PO_NUM , PAY_CNT , PY_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(GATE_CD, PY_BUYER_CD, 'KO') AS PY_BUYER_NM , PY_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(GATE_CD, PY_BUYER_CD, PY_DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS PY_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(GATE_CD, PY_BUYER_CD, PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM FROM STOCPOPC WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} ) POPC ON (POPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT) WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} GROUP BY POPY.PO_NUM, POPY.PAY_CNT

SELECT POPY.PO_NUM , POPY.PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_CNT_TYPE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , POPC.PY_BUYER_CD , POPC.PY_DEPT_CD , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POPC.GATE_CD, POPC.PY_BUYER_CD, POPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POPC.PAY_AMT AS PAY_AMT , POPC.RMK FROM STOCPOPY POPY LEFT JOIN STOCPOPC POPC ON (POPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT) WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POPY.PAY_CNT = #{PAY_CNT}

SELECT POHD.GATE_CD , POHD.BUYER_CD , PODT.PR_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , PODT.PR_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , PODT.PROGRESS_CD , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , POHD.PO_NUM , PODT.PO_SQ , POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT , POHD.SUBJECT , POHD.PO_AMT , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_DATE , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_REJECT_RMK , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE , PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE , POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG , POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_DATE , PODT.ITEM_CD , PODT.ITEM_DESC , PODT.ITEM_SPEC , PODT.PO_QT , PODT.UNIT_CD , POHD.CUR , PODT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , POHD.VAT_TYPE , PODT.DUE_DATE , PODT.INV_QT -- 검수요청수량 , IVDT.INV_AMT -- 검수요청금액 ,(PODT.PO_QT - PODT.INV_QT) AS UN_INV_QT , CASE WHEN POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT ELSE IVDT.E_INV_QT END AS GR_QT , CASE WHEN POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT * PODT.UNIT_PRC ELSE IVDT.E_INV_AMT END AS GR_AMT ,(SELECT MIN(REG_DATE) FROM STOCGRDT WHERE GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS GR_REG_DATE -- 최초입고일자(2021.01.29 변경) FROM STOCPOHD POHD JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , PO_NUM , PO_SQ , SUM(INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(INV_AMT) AS INV_AMT , SUM(E_INV_QT) AS E_INV_QT , SUM(E_INV_AMT) AS E_INV_AMT FROM (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS INV_AMT , IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = (CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' THEN '700' ELSE '300' END) THEN SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) ELSE 0 END) AS E_INV_QT ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = (CASE WHEN IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' THEN '700' ELSE '300' END) THEN SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) ELSE 0 END) AS E_INV_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE, IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ, IVHD.PROGRESS_CD ) IVDT WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.DELIVERY_TYPE , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ ) IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND POHD.PROGRESS_CD != '5100' AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS IN ('0', '200')
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_PO_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_PO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE = #{PURCHASE_TYPE}
AND UPPER(PODT.ITEM_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.ITEM_DESC) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_DESC}) '%'
AND PODT.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
AND UPPER(POHD.SUBJECT) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
ORDER BY PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, POHD.PO_NUM DESC, PODT.PO_SQ
